# TradingMapClaw (TMC)

> An independent financial-market research, intelligence-aggregation, and research-engineering platform. Dual-engine (Hermes Agent + Codex) cross-verified research across 82 tracked assets, 13 report types, 118 scheduled workflows — built and run by one operator on a single Mac mini for ~$55/month. Research & education only — WATCHLIST_ONLY. Not pity. Visibility.

TradingMapClaw (TMC) v2.0 (2026-07-12) is operated single-handedly ("the one-handed operator"). Its defining feature is cross-verification: no single model is allowed to be right alone. It aggregates financial-market information across company fundamentals, valuation, technical structure, capital flows, options context, macro conditions, and market sentiment. It is a research system — it never provides investment advice, routes orders, or executes trades.

## Key facts (v2.0, 2026-07-12)
- 118 scheduled workflows (117 enabled), 230+ Python scripts, 50+ SKILL modules
- 82 tracked assets across 5 groups; 13 report types
- Cost: ~$55/month budget cap
- Delivery: English → Telegram, Chinese → Feishu
- Boundary: WATCHLIST_ONLY — no broker API, no order execution, no buy/sell recommendations
- Runs on macOS (Apple Silicon), one Mac mini

## Engine positioning
- Dual-Engine, Multi-Model Council.
- Engine 1 = Hermes Agent (orchestration + fundamental/macro/sentiment analysis)
- Engine 2 = Codex (independent re-derivation and cross-verification of Engine 1's numbers)
- Council = DeepSeek V4 Pro + GLM-5.2 + GPT-5.6 (+ local Qwen3 14B fallback)
- Analysis runs in three passes: Pass A (build) → Pass B (verify) → Pass C (council resolution)
- Outputs use bullish / neutral / bearish scenario labels — never BUY/HOLD/SELL instructions
- Tagline: "One model can be confidently wrong. A second engine catches it. A council decides."

## What it publishes (free)
- Weekly Market Radar — desensitized watchlist observations, scenario labels: https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/radar
- Research hub (Market Radar, Market Structure Briefs, Engine Disagreement Notes, Research Method Releases): https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/research
- System Build Log (weekly): https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/build-log
- How the dual-engine system runs day to day (schedule, architecture): https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/system
- Deep-analysis method walkthroughs: https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/deep-analysis
- Free Research Checklist (interactive, no signup required): https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/checklist.html

## Products & services
- Tutorial 01 / 02 / 03 (PDF, $19 each) and Complete Bundle ($49)
- Engineering Patterns Bundle — 7 skill packs ($79, one-time)
- Skills Library ($29/mo) — founding waitlist only, not on sale yet
- Services: Operator Consulting ($200/60min), Research-System Audit ($399), Architecture Blueprint Session ($699) — technical/process consulting only
- Catalog: https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/products
- Consulting qualification form: https://www.tradingmapclaw.com/consulting
